question_intent: calculate the average goals against per game for goalies who played in the Campbell Conference and have a Hall of Fame status

plan.question_intent: calculate the average goals against per game for goalies who played in the Campbell Conference and have a Hall of Fame status
plan.detail_query: SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game FROM goalies g JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code JOIN master m ON g.playerid = m.playerid JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference') AND (h.category = 'Player')

steps.clause: a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference' OR a.fullname = 'Wales Conference' OR a.fullname = 'Eastern Conference'
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN master m ON g.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid

JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid

SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g

JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid

build_logs.notes: average goals against per game for goalies who played in the Campbell Conference and have a Hall of Fame status

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN master m ON g.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference' OR a.fullname = 'Wales Conference' OR a.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (h.category = 'Player')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga_per_game) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
JOIN master m ON g.playerid = m.playerid
JOIN hof h ON m.hofid = h.hofid
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference' OR a.fullname = 'Wales Conference' OR a.fullname = 'Eastern Conference') AND (h.category = 'Player')) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.ga_per_game) AS avg_ga_per_game
FROM (SELECT g.playerid, g.year, g.ga, g.gp, CAST(g.ga AS REAL) / CAST(g.gp AS REAL) AS ga_per_game
FROM goalies g
JOIN teams t ON g.tmid = t.tmid
JOIN abbrev a ON t.confid = a.code
WHERE (a.type = 'Conference') AND (a.fullname = 'Campbell Conference')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average goals-against per game among all Hall of Fame goalies who played in the Campbell, Wales, or Eastern Conference?
